issues.description: First action rests Self (this Character), but card text says 'You may rest this Character' as a cost/condition for the ability, not as a mandatory action. The actual effect is only the opponent's Character rest. The self-rest should be a condition or prerequisite, not an action.
Target should specify 'up to 1' constraint. Current 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' lacks explicit quantity limit. Should be maxCount:1.
